Transport and protocol implementations, serial communication, console command handling, and PULSE operations for Pebble firmware.


## Files
- **[best_effort_transport.c](best_effort_transport.c.md)**: Implements the Best Effort transport and application protocols for handling packet transmission in the Pebble firmware.
- **[cobs.c](cobs.c.md)**: Implements COBS encoding and streaming decoding functions for data transmission.
- **[cobs.h](cobs.h.md)**: Implements Consistent Overhead Byte Stuffing (COBS) encoding and decoding functions.
- **[console_internal.h](console_internal.h.md)**: Defines and manages serial console states and provides functions to set and get the current state.
- **[control_protocol.c](control_protocol.c.md)**: Implements a control protocol for managing link states and handling packets in a PPP environment.
- **[control_protocol.h](control_protocol.h.md)**: Defines the PPPControlProtocol structure and functions for managing control protocol states.
- **[control_protocol_impl.h](control_protocol_impl.h.md)**: Defines data structures and functions for managing PPP control protocol states and events.
- **[dbgserial.c](dbgserial.c.md)**: Serial communication functions for initializing, changing baud rate, and sending formatted strings.
- **[dbgserial.h](dbgserial.h.md)**: Header file for serial debugging functions, including initialization, character output, and baud rate control.
- **[dbgserial_input.c](dbgserial_input.c.md)**: Handles debug serial input with interrupt and DMA support, including stop mode management.
- **[dbgserial_input.h](dbgserial_input.h.md)**: Input functionality for the debug serial port, including initialization and DMA-based receiving control.
- **[prompt.c](prompt.c.md)**: Implements a console prompt system for executing commands and handling responses in the Pebble firmware.
- **[prompt.h](prompt.h.md)**: Handles the prompt mode of the serial console, allowing command execution and context management.
- **[prompt_commands.c](prompt_commands.c.md)**: Implements various console commands for managing flash memory, Bluetooth operations, and system tests in the Pebble firmware.
- **[prompt_commands.h](prompt_commands.h.md)**: Header file defining various console command functions for the Pebble firmware, including logging, button events, and system control.
- **[pulse.c](pulse.c.md)**: Implements the PULSE protocol for communication, including initialization, frame handling, and transmission.
- **[pulse.h](pulse.h.md)**: Functions for early initialization and multitasking initialization of PULSE in the firmware.
- **[pulse2.c](pulse2.c.md)**: Implements a PULSE task for handling data link layer operations, including reliable retransmission and protocol control.
- **[pulse2_reliable_protocol_registry.def](pulse2_reliable_protocol_registry.def.md)**: Defines protocol numbers and event handlers for the PULSE2 reliable transport application.
- **[pulse2_reliable_retransmit_timer.h](pulse2_reliable_retransmit_timer.h.md)**: Functions for managing a retransmit timer in PULSEv2 reliable transport.
- **[pulse2_transport_impl.h](pulse2_transport_impl.h.md)**: Functions and macros for managing packet transmission over the PULSE2 link in the Pebble firmware.
- **[pulse2_transport_registry.def](pulse2_transport_registry.def.md)**: Defines PULSE2 transport protocol event registry with protocol numbers and handler directives.
- **[pulse_bulkio.c](pulse_bulkio.c.md)**: Implements PULSE bulk I/O operations with command handling for open, close, read, write, CRC, stat, and erase.
- **[pulse_bulkio_coredump.c](pulse_bulkio_coredump.c.md)**: Implements core dump handling for the Pulse BulkIO domain, including read, write, and erase operations.
- **[pulse_bulkio_domain_handler.h](pulse_bulkio_domain_handler.h.md)**: Defines the PulseBulkIODomainHandler structure for managing Pulse BulkIO contexts, including open, close, read, write, stat, and erase operations.
- **[pulse_bulkio_external_flash.c](pulse_bulkio_external_flash.c.md)**: Implements external flash memory operations including read, write, erase, open, and close.
- **[pulse_bulkio_framebuffer.c](pulse_bulkio_framebuffer.c.md)**: Implements framebuffer domain operations for reading, writing, and managing display data.
- **[pulse_bulkio_handler.def](pulse_bulkio_handler.def.md)**: Registers bulk I/O handlers for different domains in the Pebble firmware.
- **[pulse_bulkio_memory.c](pulse_bulkio_memory.c.md)**: Implements memory domain operations for reading, writing, erasing, and managing status in bulk I/O.
- **[pulse_bulkio_pfs.c](pulse_bulkio_pfs.c.md)**: Implements file operations for the Pulse Bulk IO domain using a PFS (Pulse File System) handler.
- **[pulse_control_message_protocol.c](pulse_control_message_protocol.c.md)**: Implements a protocol for handling and responding to pulse control messages in firmware.
- **[pulse_control_message_protocol.h](pulse_control_message_protocol.h.md)**: Defines the PulseControlMessageProtocol structure and functions for sending and handling messages.
- **[pulse_flash_imaging.c](pulse_flash_imaging.c.md)**: Handles flash imaging commands for erasing, writing, and querying flash memory regions.
- **[pulse_internal.h](pulse_internal.h.md)**: Defines constants and functions for managing PULSE sessions and handling serial communication.
- **[pulse_llc.c](pulse_llc.c.md)**: Implements the Pulse LLC protocol handler for message processing and link management.
- **[pulse_llc.h](pulse_llc.h.md)**: Functions for sending link status messages and handling unknown protocols.
- **[pulse_pp.c](pulse_pp.c.md)**: Implements the PULSE transport protocol for managing communication sessions over Bluetooth.
- **[pulse_protocol_impl.h](pulse_protocol_impl.h.md)**: Defines functions and macros for sending and managing PULSE protocol frames in different link states.
- **[pulse_protocol_registry.def](pulse_protocol_registry.def.md)**: Defines and registers protocol numbers and handlers for PULSE frames in the firmware.
- **[push_transport.c](push_transport.c.md)**: Implements a push transport protocol for sending packets using the Pulse2 protocol.
- **[reliable_transport.c](reliable_transport.c.md)**: Implements a reliable transport protocol with retransmission and supervisory packet handling for Pebble firmware.
- **[serial_console.c](serial_console.c.md)**: Implements a serial console for logging and prompt handling with state management.
- **[serial_console.h](serial_console.h.md)**: Functions for initializing and managing a serial console, including logging and prompt control.
- **[ui_nudge.c](ui_nudge.c.md)**: Debugging functions for nudging UI layers in the Pebble firmware console.
- **[ui_nudge.h](ui_nudge.h.md)**: Functions for entering nudging mode and handling prompt characters in the console.
